title: Acronym full forms
description: Identifies all acronyms in the document and adds their full forms in comments.

title: Automatic bookmark generation
description: Automatically generates bookmarks for all heading paragraphs in the document, using the heading text as the bookmark name.

title: Calculate time to read
description: Analyzes the text content of the entire document, counts the number of words, adjusts for the text complexity, and calculates how long it would take an average adult to read it.

title: Create content control list
description: Creates a ContentControlList from all single-level numbered lists throughout the document, as well as from the manually selected text section.

title: Create custom header
description: Creates a custom header with an image and a title.

title: Custom header and footer generation
description: Applies predefined headers and footers to all pages in the document.

title: Delete bookmark
description: Searches for bookmarks containing a specific word in their text and deletes them from the document.

title: Generate hyperlinks
description: Generates and inserts hyperlinks instead of text URLs.

title: Generate table of contents
description: Generates a table of contents by scanning the document for headings.

title: Generate word definitions
description: Generates word definitions in your document using the [Dictionary API](https://api-ninjas.com/api/dictionary) offered by [API Ninjas](https://api-ninjas.com).

title: Highlight predefined keywords
description: Highlights predefined keywords in text document.

title: Identify overused words
description: Analyzes the frequency of words in a document and identifies overused words based on specified thresholds.

title: Insert text
description: Inserts text into the document at the current cursor position.

title: Insert unique id
description: Inserts a unique id into a form document.

title: Insert watermark
description: Inserts or removes a custom watermark on every page of the document.

title: Paragraphs to table
description: Converts a list of numbered paragraphs into a table.

title: Remove empty tables
description: Removes all the empty tables from the document.

title: Remove extra spaces
description: Removes extra spaces in text document.

title: Replace words in document
description: Searches for a word throughout the document and replaces it with the given replacement word.

title: Reset text properties
description: Resets the text properties of all the paragraphs in a document to the default settings.

title: Search for keyword in comments
description: Marks comments containing a specific keyword as solved in a document.

title: Sort tables
description: Automatically sorts table rows alphabetically or numerically based on the selected column.
